score_formula: score(c,p) = mean(.X over panel_genes_measured) - mean(.X over matched controls)

binning.universe: all 18130 finite assay-present genes (var_names), before pruning
binning.statistic: per-gene mean of .X over all 396000 cells (chunked float64 streaming column-sum)
binning.bins_content_sha256_def: sha256 of newline-joined 'var_index,gene,bin' rows in var_names order
binning.bins_are_loaded_not_recomputed: validation and the 20-seed sensitivity LOAD stage01_bins_v3.csv; the per-gene bins are NOT re-derived (the mean is float-order fragile on non-marker borderline genes)

superseded_intermediate.status: unrecoverable — the Phase-1 kernel state that produced it is gone; the checkpoint stored only marker_bins/candidate_counts/hash, not the 18130 per-gene bins. NO per-gene diff can be claimed against it.

bins_amendment.kind: prospective equivalent-method amendment (NOT recovery of the original intermediate)
bins_amendment.reason: T7b self-check found bins_sha256=0e8423df not reproducible (float summation order); materialize the bins as an explicit committed artifact loaded (not recomputed) by validation.
bins_amendment.scores_unchanged: scorer coefficients and all 396k scores are byte-unchanged; no 396k re-run

acceptance_met.note: reproducing only the primary controls is necessary but not sufficient; (1)+(2)+(3) together prove equivalence on the occupied marker bins, so alt-seed draws reproduce

bins_amendment.independent_verification: lead loaded the emitted bins and confirmed all three acceptance checks with own code (marker_bins 0 mismatches, candidate_counts 0 mismatches, 2100 controls 0 mismatches; detected 17956, eligible 17903)
bins_amendment.aborted_t7b_attempt: the first T7b run correctly aborted (EXIT=1) on the bins_sha256 self-check; that abort triggered this amendment and is preserved in provenance (not silently replaced)

pool.definition: detected_in_396k minus the 53 present program/activation marker genes

draw.select: 50 lowest hex digests per occupied marker bin, no replacement
draw.digest_tie: digest_hex ascending, then var_name index ascending
draw.occupied_bin_definition: bins containing the program's detected (measured) panel genes

activation_predictor_draw.independently_verified: lead reproduced these 150 rows with the frozen algorithm (key 12345|activation_predictor|{bin}|{gene}); occupied bins {18,22,24}, zero leakage
activation_predictor_draw.note: controls for the activation-adjusted CD4 CTL-like sensitivity lane; display/sensitivity-only; never a Stage-2 pole. Rows are in stage01_controls_v3.csv (program_id=activation_predictor).

intended_only_absent.note: absent from var; recorded intended-only; never scored

residual_correlation_note: program-order-invariant draws remove DIRECT cross-panel leakage; they do NOT make programs biologically or statistically independent. Shared controls and genuine co-expression can still correlate programs; residual correlation is measured and reported in validation, never asserted away.

independent_verification.method: independent code: chunked float64 CSR column-means -> divN bins -> detected pool -> own keyed-hash draws
independent_verification.result: 11/11 primary programs byte-identical control sets (1950 rows, 0 mismatches on (program_id,bin,rank_in_bin)) + activation_predictor 150 rows independently reproduced (bins {18,22,24}, 0 leakage); total 2100 control rows; reproduced detected=17956, control_eligible_pool=17903, bin24_eligible=715, bin0_eligible=552, marker union 54 present 53 absent [HLA-DRA]
